items.title: RingCentral Appoints Mahmoud ElAssir to Board of Directors
items.description: BELMONT, Calif., January 07, 2026--RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a global leader in agentic voice AI-powered cloud communications, today announced the appointment of Mahmoud ElAssir to its Board of Directors, effective immediately.
